title: Mehrangarh Fort
description: A massive fort in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, showcasing intricate architecture and panoramic views of the Blue City.

title: Rath Yatra
description: Annual chariot festival of Lord Jagannath in Puri, Odisha, attracting millions of devotees.

title: Pushkar Camel Fair
description: An annual livestock fair in Pushkar, Rajasthan, featuring camel trading, folk performances, and vibrant cultural festivities.

title: Konark Sun Temple
description: A 13th-century temple in Odisha shaped like a colossal chariot, dedicated to the Sun God.

title: Bihu Festival
description: Traditional Assamese festival celebrating harvest with music, dance, and community gatherings.
